articles.title: Enormous 3D map of the universe shows brilliant 'sea of light' near the cosmic dawn - Live Science
articles.description: A unique technique allowed astronomers to see the early universe as a "sea of light" and explore the effects of gravity and dark energy on cosmic evolution.
